findings.description: claude -p --output-format stream-json requires --verbose flag. All runs silently failed without it.
findings.proposedRule: Test CLI flag combinations with real binary, not just mocks.

findings.source: design gap discovered during first run
findings.description: Plugin loading requires --plugin-dir for skill availability in non-standard dirs.
findings.proposedRule: Verify plugin availability early in design for non-standard Claude Code contexts.

findings.description: Eval JSON field names silently mismatch handler dispatch keys: state_check/state, sequence/expected_sequence, seed.type not branched
findings.proposedRule: Add schema validation that checks all JSON field names against registered handlers before execution.

findings.source: 393 tests passed but 3 bugs found in first real run
findings.description: All tests mock subprocess — integration seams between components untested. Bugs at path resolution, flag combinations, field name mismatches.
findings.proposedRule: Include at least one non-mocked smoke test for subprocess pipelines.

findings.description: Review caught: silent exception swallow, workdir leaks, hardcoded paths, unguarded getattr — patterns tests couldn't catch.
findings.proposedRule: Post-build PR review is a critical quality gate.
